name: tascabile
description: Repository di estensioni Paperback 0.9 mantenuta da DarkDragonkz.
repositoryDescription: Repository di estensioni Paperback 0.9 mantenuta da DarkDragonkz.

scripts.format: oxfmt tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json .github/workflows/build.yml src/MangaWorld/**/*.ts src/common/**/*.ts src/generic/config.ts src/generic/models.ts src/generic/network.ts src/generic/utils.ts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json .github/workflows/build.yml src/MangaWorld/**/*.ts src/common/**/*.ts src/generic/config.ts src/generic/models.ts src/generic/network.ts src/generic/utils.ts
scripts.test: npm run tsc && npm run lint:check && npm run format:check && npm run bundle
